action.reasoning: Observation: Best is ridge_W_tv (last-value sub, lam=1000) MSE=0.4637. New scan with lambdas [100,300,1000,3000,...] showed lam=300 best on val (last-mode) at 1.5661. Let me submit ridge_last_tv (which uses lam=300 on train+val, last-mode). Actually current ridge_W_tv used lam=1000. lam=300 may give marginal improvement. Decision: Submit ridge_last_tv.npy to test.
